column1: We booked on Saturday February 28th early in the morning. We wanted to book the day before but we couldn't all get together to solidify the plans.

Hey Spiffy. My name is Dylan Satornino and I had a trip booked with SpringBreakU in Punta Cana for the 15-19th. I got your number from a friend after our original booking got canceled. When clicking on the link now, it says you are still able to purchase a room for the 15-19th. Is this accurate or will it still not work? We only had a room for two people and we are trying to figure out how we’d still be able to go. If that link doesn’t work is there anything else that we could do to get a trip planned?
Dylan brother! Hope all is well. Unfort our Punta Cana trip is sold out for the entire month. any bookings made from the 28th going were refunded and cancelled
What's up my man. My buddy told me you might be able to squeeze us in and said we should send you a text about it. What would we have to do to get that set up?
His names Ryan if that helps
Yo D! Whats good. yea were you and Ben tryna get back active?
Yessir most definitely if we can
Cool I'll work on it rn. Do you have flights situated?
It's just the two of us so let me know what to do and we got you asap
Would look at flights first if you first if you don't already have those
Ok we can get them rn. We already found the flight just need to buy the tix
Nah we had to cancel but we have some picked out if we can get the room
Would yall be able to get things situated tonight once it's reactive?
Yea we can if the dates match up. It's the 15th - 19th right?
My bad I meant to ask what the dates would be for the room for
Yup same as before. Getting it reactivated now
We're buying tickets now this is 100% right, no cancel?
We have flights selected rn we're good to go. The link isn't working yet could you send me it again?
Yes in about 20 mins will have it all ready
Hey thanks for hooking us up man. We got our flights and stay all booked. Could you double check that we're all set on the site? Thanks again
morning bro, you both on the same flight?
Okay just make sure Ben enters his flight info as well so we can schedule your transportation service
Well his, yours is all set
yo D did y'all want to add any of the party pass tickets or booze cruise event to your trip?
would we have to do that before we go our could we decide once we're there?
yea you have up to a 48 hours before the trip to add it online
you can also do it on arrival but I'm not sure what pricing or availability will be
yooooo D safe travels today bro. see y'all when you get here
Thanks man 🙏Waiting for takeoff from Baltimore see you soon
